baseline_estimation_support_rule: use fully_supported observations only; first full year 1931
justification: Gross real GPIM stock is the baseline productive-capital quantity.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: use fully_supported observations only; first full year 1931
justification: Preferred logged analytical form of gross real GPIM stock.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: choice depends on later theoretical formula; first full year 1932 for TOT growth
justification: Arithmetic and log growth are both valid but not interchangeable; S29H must choose explicitly.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: use only if lagged level appears explicitly in a later contract; first full year 1932
justification: Lagged log gross stock is admissible only for a later bounded lag specification.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: use only if lagged growth appears explicitly in a later contract; first full year 1933
justification: Lagged gross-stock log growth is admissible only for a later bounded lag specification.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: secondary robustness only; first full year 1931
justification: Net real GPIM stock is depreciation-sensitive and secondary to gross stock.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: secondary robustness only; first full year 1931
justification: Logged net stock is retained for robustness, not baseline productive-capital quantity.

baseline_estimation_support_rule: flow diagnostic; not a stock substitute
justification: Investment is a flow and cannot substitute for a stock level.

recommended_variable_id: SHARE_GROSS_ME_TOT; SHARE_GROSS_NRC_TOT; SHARE_NET_ME_TOT; SHARE_NET_NRC_TOT; SHARE_INVESTMENT_ME_TOT; SHARE_INVESTMENT_NRC_TOT
justification: Shares describe composition and are not construction weights.
Rates describe accounting intensities and are not structural parameters.
